title: carex × binderi
intro: Carex × binderi, also known as Binder's sedge, is a hybrid plant species in the family Cyperaceae, resulting from the cross between Carex aquatilis and Carex rostrata. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Carex × binderi include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and potentially aiding in the treatment of certain infections. Carex × binderi can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusate, and is also used in traditional folk medicine in various parts of the world.
